mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `hos_office` WHERE 1=1 AND hospital_name in
#{hospitalName.hospitalName}

SELECT count(*) FROM `hos_office` where 1 = 1
AND hospital_name LIKE '%${hospitalName}%'
AND offices_name LIKE '%${officesName}%'

SELECT * FROM `hos_office` WHERE 1=1
AND hospital_name LIKE '%${hospitalName}%'
AND offices_name LIKE '%${officesName}%'
ORDER BY RAND() limit #{start},#{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hos_office (offices_name, hospital_name, doctor_num, offices_honor, offices_equipment, offices_about, offices_diagnosis_scope) VALUES (#{officesName}, #{hospitalName}, #{doctorNum}, #{officesHonor}, #{officesEquipment}, #{officesAbout}, #{officesDiagnosisScope})
mapper.update: UPDATE hos_office SET offices_name = #{officesName}, hospital_name = #{hospitalName}, offices_honor = #{officesHonor}, offices_equipment = #{officesEquipment}, offices_about = #{officesAbout}, offices_diagnosis_scope = #{officesDiagnosisScope} WHERE id = #{id}
